name: Cervix Checks
description: Routine cervical exams to check dilation
defaultPref: Decline unless medically necessary (admitted, before pushing, before epidural, stalled progress)

name: Water Breaking (AROM)
defaultPref: Open if 7cm+ dilated or labor significantly stalled

name: IV / Saline Lock
description: Intravenous access for fluids and medication

name: Continuous Monitoring
defaultPref: Only if medical reason; internal monitoring if needed

name: Epidural
defaultPref: Open after 6cm dilated or if labor significantly stalled

name: IV Pain Meds (Narcotics)
defaultPref: OK for early labor if really need rest

name: Laughing Gas (Nitrous)
defaultPref: Want to try before other pain meds if not coping well

name: Induction
description: Medical methods to start/speed up labor
defaultPref: Only after 41 weeks; research exact timing

name: Pitocin
defaultPref: May have fewer endorphins — need extra support and love

name: Vacuum / Forceps / Episiotomy
defaultPref: Only if medically necessary and alternative is C-section; prefer to keep pushing if possible

name: C-Section
defaultPref: Discuss in detail why it's necessary
